title: commicarpus pilosus
intro: Commicarpus pilosus is a species of flowering plant in the family Phytolaccaceae, commonly known as the desert holly or woolly sandberry. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Commicarpus pilosus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
